description_long: This cathedral features a prominent central octagonal nave topped with a tall, steeply pitched conical spire, crowned by a cross. The exterior walls are articulated with a series of buttresses and pointed arched windows, some with intricate tracery. The structure includes a secondary, square bell tower with multiple levels and small arched openings. The main entrance is marked by a short staircase leading to a pointed arched portal, flanked by decorative columns and subtle relief ornamentation. The roofline is adorned with a repeating pattern of triangular gables and cornices, adding to the vertical emphasis of the design. The overall appearance is grand and monumental, with a harmonious blend of geometric forms and restrained decorative elements.
description: A grand cathedral with a tall conical spire, octagonal nave, and a secondary square bell tower, featuring pointed arched windows and subtle decorative details. The structure is monumental, with buttresses, gables, and a prominent entry portal.
description_view_0: This view highlights the central spire, octagonal nave, and a series of pointed arched windows with decorative tracery, as well as the layered roofline and buttresses.
description_view_1: The main entrance with its staircase and pointed arched portal is visible, along with the repeating gable pattern and a clear view of the nave's side windows.
description_view_2: A direct view of the main entry portal and staircase, emphasizing the symmetry of the facade and the verticality of the spire above.
description_view_3: This angle showcases the secondary square bell tower, additional side entrances, and the complex arrangement of buttresses and roof elements.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: The facade features pointed arches, decorative cornices, and subtle reliefs, with minimal statuary or elaborate tracery. Ornamentation is restrained, focusing on geometric patterns and structural elements.
attribute_entry_portal_design: The main entry portal is a pointed arch with a short staircase, flanked by decorative columns and subtle reliefs. The design is elegant and understated, with no prominent sculptures.
